message:
style: rustfmt formatting across mysql, happy_eyeballs, middleware, grpc tests

Automated formatting cleanup:
- mysql.rs: unwrap multi-line if-let, tuple, and test URL strings
- happy_eyeballs.rs: compress filter iterator chains to single lines
- middleware.rs: reformat test assertions and constructor calls
- grpc_verification.rs: alphabetize import order for CompressionEncoding
  and MetadataInterceptor

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,9 +30,9 @@ use asupersync::grpc::{
     Channel,
     ChannelConfig,
     ClientStreaming,
-    CompressionEncoding,
     // Status types
     Code,
+    CompressionEncoding,
     FramedCodec,
     GrpcClient,
     // Codec types
@@ -51,10 +51,10 @@ use asupersync::grpc::{
     InterceptorLayer,
     // Streaming types
     Metadata,
+    MetadataInterceptor,
     MetadataValue,
     // Service types
     MethodDescriptor,
-    MetadataInterceptor,
     NamedService,
     ReflectedMethod,
     ReflectionDescribeServiceRequest,
